item.name: Aetherolectric Guitarfish
item.description:
A king among guitarfish, and lord of the waters of Scholar's Harbor.

[Suitable for display in aquariums tier 2 and higher.]
[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: Fascinating despite its repulsive countenance, this massive guitarfish creates weak electrical currents through the vibration of its gills─the potency of which vary depending on the speed it is moving. Reports of fishermen unwittingly bobbing their heads to the symphony of notes produced by this curious phenomenon led to the creature's present nomenclature.

obj.n: Tome of Ichthyological Folklore - Ilsabard and the Northern Empty
